ddt:Target.Name: XFA_RaCam_V3_6
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU : RACAM Functions : ACC/AEBS/DW/FCW/AEBp/LDW/LKA/TSR/OSP/AHL Vehicle : XFA Supplier : DELPHI (Hexa : 0x44656C706869) PDE RaCam : Damien AMMEUX Tel 56706 Authors : Damien AMMEUX sce 65360 & Jonathan BACH Sce 65360 & David CHEDEVILLE (AKKA) Sce 65360
-V3.1 20/02/2015 For ST3.1 Implementation of DTC_list_V3_4 : DTC_ECUBlindness deleted and replaced by DTC Camera_Blindness and DTC RadarBlindness Implementation of DID_list_V2_1
-V3.1.1 17/03/2015 Fort ST3.1: implementation of correction present in DID list V2.1.1 (WARNING : data order has changed in DID 4022 in order to stay coherent with DID list) - addition of screen for Plant Alignment
-V3_1_2 07/04/2015: Correction due to mistake in DID list . Following DIDs are back accessible in writing; DID 405D, 4058, 404D, 404B, 4035, 4036, 4038, 4039, 403A, 403B, 403C, 403D, 403E, 403F, 4040, 4041, 4042, 4043, 4044, 4045, 4046, 4047, 4048, 4049, 404A, 4005, 4007, 4008, 2090, 4070, 4069, 4068, 4067, 4066, 4065, 4064, 4063, 4062, 4060, 405F, 405E, 405C, 4058, 4050
-V3_2 10/04/2015: - NEW DTC added: FANdefault (AD17) - additon of new DID 5030, 5031, 5032 - deletion of parameter Diag_AddOn_buffer_crash_Nx_Tn.AEBS_FailureStatus_Nx_Tn - other changes in line with DID list V2-2
-V3_3_1 12/06/2015 - update according DID_list_V2_3_1 for ST4.1 + mapping update of DIDs 4021 and 4029 - update according DTC list V3_7 for ST4.1 - update according [Alignment]_NT65360_2013_1-V2_3
-V3_3_2 16/07/2015 - update according DID_list_V2_3_3
-V3_4 31/07/2015 - deleting parameters in DID 0104: Radar_Status.V_flag_x_ACCID and Radar_Status.V_flag_x_AebsID - deleting parameters in DID 0103: Failures_status_2.V_flag_x_ClockError and Failures_status_2.V_flag_x_ChecksumError - update according DID list V2_4 - deleting offsets of parameters in DID 4021 - correction of DID 4023 size from 16 to 8 bits in compliance of DID list document
-V3_5 10/2015 - update according DID list V2_5 - removing "_b" datas, DIDs, requests - update bit position for calibration_status data in DID 4021 - update of data "Forward Looking Radar Calibration Result.Automatic Alignment Enabled" (liste) - update of data "RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo" (values) - update of answers for requests routines
-V3_6 01/2016 - Guillaume Mahe - update according DID_list V2.81 - update of Auto-identification and corresponding datas - deleting all DiagAddOn parameters and DIDs - Adding ACC screens

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Comment: Braking pressure rate limitation when no target is detected.

Data.Name: torque_controller_1.P_tng_BrakeRampSpeedTooLow

Data.Comment: Low level Threshold above which the engine is needed by ACC.

Data.Comment: Hysteresis of gas pedal position

Data.Comment: Gas Pedal position Threshold to consider if the driver is making a marked accel pedal push or not

Data.Comment: Gas Pedal position Threshold to consider if the driver is making a strong accel pedal push or not

Data.Comment: 1 second in case of gas pedal bounce

Data.Name: AEBS15_TT_Driver_behaviour.P_tng_pctps_ThresholdGPSLow
Data.Comment: The gas pedal speed is compared to this threshold to consider or not a gas pedal release.

Data.Name: AEBS15_TT_Driver_behaviour.P_tng_pctps_ThresholdGPSHigh
Data.Comment: The gas pedal speed is compared to this threshold to consider or not a gas pedal release.

Data.Comment: Gas pedal threshold.

Data.Comment: Minimum threshold to consider the time transfer between the brake and the accel pedals short.

Data.Name: AEBS15_TT_Driver_behaviour.P_tng_s_ShortTransferTimeThr
Data.Comment: Maximum threshold to consider the time transfer between the brake and the accel pedals short.

Data.Name: AEBS16_GP_Processing.P_tng_s_HoldInitPedalPos
Data.Comment: Time to hold the initial position of the gas pedal when an emergency situation is detected.

Data.Comment: Rising feet speed threshold in % when you want to consider an emergency gas pedal release.

Data.Comment: Temporary thr in case of GP bounce
